feed.title: SAP Community - SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud
feed.subtitle: SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: [i] CHECKING FOR ADDITIONAL PARAMETERS IN CREATE DUNNING NOTICES APP
entry.content:
Hello Team, 

Requesting checking if the Additional Parameters in Create Dunning Notice Application is feasible to add additional parameters. The Parameters that business wants to add is Line of Business. 

Please let me know as soon as possible if this request is feasible to implement in the Create Dunning Notice App. 

Thank you!

Best regards,

Gelo

entry.title: Public Cloud 2602 / Can you define a standard Company Layout for My Home ?
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

i have a question regarding the customizing of the Space "My Home". As far as i know, if permitted, the user is able to customize his own "My Home" Page and hide or add different functions. 
I also know about the App "Launchpad Settings" and the settings that can be made there.

My question is, is it possible to define a standard layout for "My Home" for all users in the system and prohibit them from changing it ? With layout i mean, can the user see certain tiles, the news or  the section "Insights".
If it is, please explain how this can be achieved.

Best regards
Lukas

entry.title: Maintenance Order Actual and Planned Costs fields not available in Custom CDS View
entry.content:
Hello,
We are connecting Power BI to SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition.
When using I_MaintenanceOrderBasic as Primary Datasource, the fields TotalPlannedCost and TotalActualCost are not available in the Elements tab.
Which CDS View should be used to get Maintenance Order Planned and Actual costs for Power BI reporting via OData ?
Thank you !

entry.title: Custom Field is automatically uppercase
entry.content:
After selecting an item from the dropdown suggestion list (code list), the value displayed in the custom field is automatically converted to uppercase.

However, for some previous custom fields, when I selected a value from the dropdown list, the system kept the original key value instead of converting it to uppercase.

Can someone explain why this happens? Is there any background reason for this behavior, and is there a way to resolve it?

entry.title: MANDATORY TEXT HEADER FIELD AT GROUP JOURNAL ENTRY POST
entry.content:
We would like to implement a validation rule to make mandatory the text field of the header, DocumentItemText, of a group journal entry.

It should be validated when the user would post through the following applications:

  • “Post Group Journal Entries” F2971
  • “Import Group Journal Entries” F3073

Our approach is to create a validation rule through "Manage Substitution/Validation Rules – Group Journal Entries" F4407 app, using "GR Journal Entry Item" as business context.

However, when searching for the field in the Validation section of the rule, we are unable to locate the field "DocumentItemText" in the Field/Function selector.

 

Is “DocumentItemText” the right name of the related text field?

If yes, would you mind to let us know how could it be enabled to make it mandatory?

 

Thank you in advance for your support.

 

Best regards,

INETUM Team

Almudena Va

entry.title: Skipping Invoice Checks for Reversal Events in MRM_CHECK_INVOICE_CLOUD
entry.content:
I am using MRM_CHECK_INVOICE_CLOUD for invoice checking.
This method is automatically triggered during posting, checking, and reversing.
How can I distinguish between these events and skip the check for reversing events?

entry.title: Freight Unit with Non Stock Material
entry.content:
Hello SAP experts,

I am working with SAP Transportation Management (TM) in S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition and I have a question about a generated Freight Unit with Non Stock Materials.

How can I create a Freight Unit with a non-stock material in SAP S/HANA Cloud Public Edition?

Thank you for your insights!

entry.title: MANDATORY TEXT HEADER FIELD AT GROUP JOURNAL ENTRY POST
entry.content:
We would like to implement a validation rule to make mandatory the text field of the header, DocumentItemText, of a group journal entry. It should be validated when the user would post through the following applications:

  • “Post Group Journal Entries” F2971
  • “Import Group Journal Entries” F3073

Our approach is to create a validation rule through "Manage Substitution/Validation Rules – Group Journal Entries" F4407 app, using "GR Journal Entry Item" as business context.

However, when searching for the field in the Validation section of the rule, we are unable to locate the field "DocumentItemText" in the Field/Function selector.

Is “DocumentItemText” the right name of the related text field? Or perhaps is that field missing?

If yes, would you mind to let us know how could it be enabled to make it mandatory?

We have seen that there is  the following BAdIs : FIN_ACDOC_HEADER_VALIDATION - Journal Entry Header Validation 

Is there an equivalent but for Group Reporting Journal entry that would validate if the text field of the header would be filled?

entry.title: Issue with Event-Based Production Costing: Goods Receipt Value
entry.content:
Hello SAP Community,

We are currently facing an issue in SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition related to Event-Based Production Costing and inventory valuation.

In the app “Analyze Production Costs - Event-Based”, the production/process order costs are calculated correctly based on:

  • Material consumption

  • Labor/activity costs

  • Other production postings

However, when posting the Goods Receipt from the production/process order, the value posted in “Material Documents Overview” is incorrect.

 

Observed behavior:

  • In some cases, the finished product is valuated at 0.

  • In other cases, the posted value is different from the cost calculated in “Analyze Production Costs - Event-Based”.

  • Semi-finished products also do not receive the expected calculated cost.

Example:
Manufacturing Order: 1000069
Difference between consumed and produced value: 939,533.19 MAD

This issue has a major impact on:

  • Inventory valuation

  • Moving Average Price calculation

  • Financial balances and production costing

Additional Information:

  • Event-Based Production Costing is active

  • No errors found in “Postprocess Event-Based Postings - Product Costing”

  • Price Control used: Moving Average Price (MAP)

My question:
What configuration or business settings should be checked to ensure that the costs calculated in “Analyze Production Costs - Event-Based” are correctly reflected in Goods Receipt postings and Material Documents?

Has anyone faced a similar issue with Event-Based Production Costing and MAP valuation?

Any guidance or recommendations would be greatly appreciated.

Thank you.

entry.title: change Document Category for Document-Related StockOutbound Delivery
entry.content:
Hi Community,

I have a question regarding Manage Outbound Delivery Orders in S/4HANA Public Cloud.

Scenario:

Sales order created
Outbound delivery created
Picking completed
Customer then informs us that the material is no longer needed
In Cloud WM, I cannot reduce the delivery quantity once the item has already been picked, and I also cannot reject it like in the former Run Outbound Process app.

What is the standard process in Public Cloud for this scenario?
Is there a way to adjust or cancel the picked quantity, or is a different process required?

Best regards,
Bastian

entry.title: Mass creation of POs for Insurance Accruals and Policy Type categorization
entry.content:
We are designing a process to manage insurance policies (deferrals expenses) via Purchase Orders in S/4HANA Public Cloud. We need clarification on the following functional requirements

1.What is the recommended standard method or API for bulk creation of Purchase Orders specifically intended for the Accrual Engine? We are looking to automate the process for hundreds of policies. 

2.Policy Categorization: To manage different insurance types, should we create multiple Purchase Order Document Types, or is it more aligned with SAP Best Practices to utilize and duplicate Product Type Groups? We need to ensure that this differentiation allows for granular reporting and clear integration with the Accrual Engine.

entry.title: Technical Inquiry on Account Differentiation via BADI_ACE_DOCUMENT_SCHEMA_CLD
entry.content:
In our S/4HANA Public Cloud environment, we are managing insurance policies (Prepaid Expenses - Account 180) using the Purchase Order Accruals process. We need to ensure that the system triggers different G/L accounts based on the "Policy Type" (Product Type Group) associated with the Purchase Order.

We need technical clarification on the following:

  1. BAdI Usage: Is BADI_ACE_DOCUMENT_SCHEMA_CLD (Accrual Engine - Document Schema Cloud) the correct and recommended enhancement point to override standard account determination for PO-based accruals?

  2. Field Availability: Does this BAdI allow us to access the Product Type Group or other Purchase Order item-level fields to drive the conditional logic for G/L account selection?
  3. Scope: Can we use this BAdI to dynamically differentiate the Debit/Credit accounts for the accrual objects created from Purchase Orders?

entry.title: SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition and ECTR
entry.content:
What Should R&D‑Heavy Customers Do?

SAP Engineering Control Center (ECTR) is positioned as a strategic solution for integrating mechanical and electrical CAD systems with SAP PLM and SAP S/4HANA. Many manufacturing customers rely on ECTR as a core component of their engineering and R&D processes

At the same time, SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition is increasingly positioned as the strategic ERP target— with clear benefits around SaaS, clean core, and innovation speed.

However, SAP ECTR is currently available only as an on‑premise solution and is not supported with SAP S/4HANA Cloud, public edition.

The Dilemma?

This creates a real challenge for customers who are:

  • R&D‑heavy and CAD‑centric
  • Already invested in SAP ECTR
  • Strategically interested in moving to S/4HANA Cloud, public edition

Today, these customers seem forced to choose between:

  • Keeping ECTR and staying on‑premise / private cloud, or
  • Moving to public cloud and rethinking core engineering processes

Neither option is trivial.

Typical Paths Discussed

  • Stay on‑premise or private cloud to keep full ECTR capabilities
  • Run a hybrid landscape, combining public cloud ERP with on‑premise ECTR
  • Adopt public‑cloud PLM services, accepting functional differences compared to ECTR

Each option comes with trade‑offs in complexity, functionality, and long‑term strategy.

Open Questions

I’d like to invite discussion from SAP and the community:

  1. How does SAP envision R&D‑heavy customers adopting S/4HANA Cloud, public edition without ECTR?
  2. Are hybrid scenarios a long‑term target architecture or only a transition phase?
  3. Is there a public‑cloud roadmap that could eventually cover ECTR‑like capabilities?

Closing

SAP ECTR is strategic.

SAP S/4HANA Cloud, public edition is strategic.

For many engineering‑driven customers, how these two strategies fit together is still unclear. I hope this post can help trigger an open and constructive discussion.

entry.title: Batch invoicing job for delivery plus sales order with same WBS or same linked Sales order
entry.content:
Hello Members,

We have a requirement of implementing an automated invoicing routine that automatically identifies and uses the pair of Sales Order and Outbound to create the billing document. The routine will also update the Billing Document's output type EDI = Immediately and save it once again. 

This routine cannot take the customer PO as reference as in the past it created issues as it would combine all outbounds that were linked to the same customer PO and create a single invoice (lump sum).

This would cause rejection from our customer, as a single billing document per SO / Outbound is expected per delivery.

We need to introduce a batch invoicing job for delivery plus sales order with the same WBS element or same linked sales order for sales Org. 
 
We checked for "schedule billing creation" app but parameter on the app is not satisfied. 

**We are working in a public cloud system**
**There was a post raised by my colleague but in that solution the mentioned BAdI(SD_BILLING_DOCUMENT_CREATE) couldn't be found in the system**
Link: Batch invoicing job for delivery plus sales order ... - SAP Community

Thanks and Regards,
Arnab

entry.title: want to undo migration from global hierarchies back to financial statement version
entry.content:
How to undo migration for financial statement version to manage global hierarchies.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: How to delete/cancel a Key User Extensibility transport from Import Collection in 2-System Landscape
entry.content:
We would like to know how to delete or cancel a transport that has already been:

1. Created in the Test system

2. Exported via "Export Software Collection"

3. Is now visible in the Production system's "Import Collection" app with status "Ready for Import" The transport is scheduled for automatic import (e.g., at 23:00). We need to understand the process to PREVENT the import and DELETE the transport from the import queue BEFORE it gets imported automatically.

 

1. Is it possible to delete a transport from the Import Collection before it gets imported?

2. If yes, which app or function should we use? - Import Collection app? - Export Software Collection app? - Another tool?

3. If deletion is not possible in the apps, do we need to create a Service Request to SAP?

4. What is the recommended process to handle incorrect transports that should NOT be imported to production?

Thank you for your guidance. 


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: How to Create Multiple intervals in the multi shift depreciation
entry.content:
How to Create Multiple intervals for each month based on Multiple asset codes(Approximately 7000 Asset codes) & their useful life in the multi shift depreciation of fixed asset module.

Tile - Manage fixed asset

Manage Fixed Asset > Valuation >0L > Book Depreciation > General Parameters >

Intervals /Shift factor / Variable Depreciation Portion to be created for each month based on Multiple asset codes(Approximately 7000 Asset codes) & their useful life

entry.title: Scope Item : 1J2 & 5XU required any cost/license?
entry.content:
Could you please confirm whether Scope Items "1J2" and "5XU" are chargeable or non-chargeable?


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: I am getting below error when I am uploading AUC assets line items.
entry.content:
I am getting below error when I am uploading AUC assets line items.

"The mandatory field "Asset Capitalization Date" is empty in sheet "General" (row 9)"

Ideally, capitalization date should be required only for Final assets, It should be for AUC assets. Why System making it mandatory filed "Capilization date" for AUC assets.

entry.title: Unable to fill in Quantity in Purchase Order Price Unit in Material Document Create API
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

I need to fill in Quantity in Purchase Order Price Unit when receiving a purchase order, but this field is not available in API: Material Documents - Read, Create. （https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_CLOUD/3f57e7df4a114edabffe8b2d581a59ed/8c451658745b1f60e10000000a44147b.html?locale=en-US）

 

Is there any other way to achieve this?

Kindly advise.

Thank you in advance

 

Note: The issue I originally encountered is in the scenario of Batch-Specific Units of Measure. However, when testing posting goods receipt with real data, errors XU033 often occur due to values not passing system validation (https://me.sap.com/notes/362932). Therefore, I considered using the purchase order price unit instead, but unfortunately, Quantity in Purchase Order Price Unit seems not available in the API.
